director.name: 塞巴斯蒂安·穆尼奥斯 Sebastián Muñoz

introduction: A powerful drama connecting the lives of three families;  one Haitian, one Argentine, and one Chilean.A female-led story, narrating the horrors and misery of the last military dictatorships in Argentina and Chile from a contemporary point of view.A journey to the past that immerses us in Chile’s anguishing social and economic crisis.
